description: Resource, experience, combat, tank, position, money, and practice fixtures.

origin.source: Constructed from PRD source protocol facts for confirmed resource MSDP variables.

fixtures.description: Current and maximum resource values parse as normalized numbers.
sourceFacts: PRD Source Protocol Facts confirms HEALTH, HEALTH_MAX, PSP, PSP_MAX, MOVEMENT, and MOVEMENT_MAX.
notes: Values are synthetic but within normal parser scalar ranges.

origin.source: Constructed from PRD source protocol facts for confirmed experience MSDP variables.

fixtures.description: Experience totals and experience to next level parse as normalized numbers.
sourceFacts: PRD Source Protocol Facts confirms EXPERIENCE, EXPERIENCE_MAX, and EXPERIENCE_TNL.
notes: This fixture keeps progression values as plain integers for deterministic parser assertions.

origin.source: Constructed from PRD source protocol facts for confirmed combat and tank MSDP variables.

fixtures.description: Opponent and tank status values parse as mixed strings and normalized numbers.
sourceFacts: PRD Source Protocol Facts confirms ATTACK_BONUS, AC, OPPONENT_NAME, OPPONENT_HEALTH, OPPONENT_HEALTH_MAX, TANK_NAME, TANK_HEALTH, and TANK_HEALTH_MAX.
DAMAGE_BONUS is excluded because Session 02 demoted it to override-only until live emission is reliable.
notes: Combat names are generic synthetic labels.

origin.source: Constructed from PRD source protocol facts for confirmed character economy and position variables.

fixtures.description: Position, money, practice, and alignment parse as expected scalar values.
sourceFacts: PRD Source Protocol Facts confirms POSITION, ALIGNMENT, MONEY, and PRACTICE.
notes: This fixture supports later state-mapping tests for distinguishing zero-like numeric values from missing data.
